testcase.name: maximum of two numbers [a: 1, b: 3, c: 3, #0]
maximum of two numbers [a: 7, b: 4, c: 7, #1]
maximum of two numbers [a: 0, b: 0, c: 0, #2]
should calculate square of number [input: 2, expected: 4, #0]
should calculate square of number [input: 3, expected: 9, #1]
should calculate square of number [input: 4, expected: 16, #2]
should calculate square of number [input: 5, expected: 25, #3]
should add numbers correctly [x: 1, y: 2, result: 3, #0]
should add numbers correctly [x: 5, y: 3, result: 8, #1]
should add numbers correctly [x: 10, y: 15, result: 25, #2]
should handle multiple operations [a: 1, b: 2, c: 3, d: 7, e: 8, f: 9, #0]
should handle multiple operations [a: 4, b: 5, c: 6, d: 10, e: 11, f: 12, #1]
should validate positive numbers [number: 1, #0]
should validate positive numbers [number: 5, #1]
should validate positive numbers [number: 10, #2]
maximum of 1 and 3 is 3
maximum of 7 and 4 is 7
maximum of 0 and 0 is 0
should validate email format [email: test@example.com, isValid: true, #0]
should validate email format [email: invalid-email, isValid: false, #1]
should validate email format [email: user@domain.org, isValid: true, #2]
should validate email format [email: not-an-email, isValid: false, #3]
should calculate area [shape: rectangle, width: 5, height: 3, expectedArea: 15, #0]
should calculate area [shape: square, width: 4, height: 4, expectedArea: 16, #1]
should calculate area [shape: rectangle, width: 10, height: 2, expectedArea: 20, #2]
should validate even numbers [number: 2, #0]
should validate even numbers [number: 4, #1]
should validate even numbers [number: 6, #2]
should validate even numbers [number: 8, #3]
should validate even numbers [number: 10, #4]
should combine data from multiple sources [name: Alice, age: 25, expected: Alice is 25 years old, #0]
should combine data from multiple sources [name: Bob, age: 30, expected: Bob is 30 years old, #1]
should combine data from multiple sources [name: Charlie, age: 35, expected: Charlie is 35 years old, #2]
should validate ranges [min: 1, max: 10, value: 5, inRange: true, #0]
should validate ranges [min: 1, max: 10, value: 15, inRange: false, #1]
should validate ranges [min: 1, max: 10, value: 1, inRange: true, #2]
should validate ranges [min: 1, max: 10, value: 10, inRange: true, #3]
addition test[0] (1 + 2 = 3)
addition test[1] (4 + 5 = 9)
addition test[2] (7 + 8 = 15)
should multiply numbers [x: 2, y: 3, expected: 6, #0]
should multiply numbers [x: 4, y: 5, expected: 20, #1]
should multiply numbers [x: 6, y: 7, expected: 42, #2]
should validate user data [name: John, email: john@test.com, age: 25, isValid: true, #0]
should validate user data [name: , email: invalid@test.com, age: 25, isValid: false, #1]
should validate user data [name: Jane, email: jane@test.com, age: -5, isValid: false, #2]
should validate user data [name: Bob, email: bob@test.com, age: 30, isValid: true, #3]
